evidence_quotes.quote: remove access to games you have bought just to force you to buy new games
by threatening to refuse their services, effectively holding them hostage.
Payment processors should not act as moral judges on content that is not illegal.

paragraphs.text: I strongly believe that the Digital Fairness Act should also include rules for video game companies that remove access to games you have bought just to force you to buy new games instead of being able to use a product you have already bought. Additionally, the behavior of payment processors such as Visa has been way out of line by forcing game storefronts to remove hundreds of games, as seen with Steam and Itch, by threatening to refuse their services, effectively holding them hostage. Payment processors should not act as moral judges on content that is not illegal.
